hero.titleBefore: Your RabbitMQ is running. Do you actually know
hero.subtitle: The RabbitMQ monitoring layer your management plugin was never built to be. Queue history, consumer health alerts, and incident diagnosis — connected in under 2 minutes. No Prometheus. No YAML.
hero.noCreditCard: 2-minute setup · No credit card · Free tier, no time limit · Developer+ from $29/mo

comparison.title: You find out about issues from your users,

traditional.title: The built-in RabbitMQ Management Plugin
traditional.point1: You find out about issues from your users, not from your monitoring
traditional.point2: You're debugging a queue filling up at 11pm — depth, no cause
traditional.point3: 3 servers, 3 tabs, no single view of what's wrong
traditional.point4: The Grafana dashboards your team built last year that nobody maintains

qarote.title: Qarote
qarote.point1: Alerts fire before your users notice — email, Slack, webhooks
qarote.point2: Rate-of-change, consumer health, and root cause in one screen
qarote.point3: All your servers and environments in a single dashboard
qarote.point4: Zero-setup monitoring — connect in 2 minutes, no scripts, no maintenance

features.title: The intelligence layer your
features.freeTierNote: Live monitoring and queue management are free, no time limit. Developer+ adds alerting, 7-day Queue History, Message Spy, and Incident Diagnosis — from $29/mo.

liveQueueMonitoring.title: Live queue monitoring
liveQueueMonitoring.description: Queue depths, message rates, and consumer counts — updated every second. Spot a stuck consumer or filling queue the moment it happens, not 60 seconds later.

smartAlertingSystem.title: Smart alerting system
smartAlertingSystem.description: Get paged before your users do. Set thresholds on queue depth, growth rate, or consumer count — alerts fire via email, Slack, or webhook the moment something's wrong, not after someone files a ticket.

queueManagement.title: Queue management
queueManagement.description: Drain, purge, or reroute queues without touching the CLI. Create exchanges, bind queues, and manage routing keys — all from the same dashboard where you spotted the problem.

performanceAnalytics.title: Performance analytics
performanceAnalytics.description: Historical charts for memory, disk, and message throughput. Spot a slow broker resource leak before it becomes a 3am page.

multiServerSupport.title: Multi-server support
multiServerSupport.description: Production, staging, and dev in one dashboard. No more three-tab incident response — all your RabbitMQ servers, one place.

messagePublishing.title: Message publishing
messagePublishing.description: Publish test messages directly to any queue or exchange without writing code. Reproduce bugs, validate routing, and debug message flow from the same dashboard.

dailyDigest.title: Daily Digest
dailyDigest.description: A morning health summary delivered to your inbox — queue depth trends, consumer anomalies, and the past 24 hours in one read. Know what built up overnight before you open a dashboard.

messageSpy.title: Message Spy
messageSpy.description: Browse headers and payloads directly inside any queue — read-only, non-destructive, production-safe. The management plugin can't show you message contents without consuming them. Message Spy does.

metricsPersistence.title: Queue History
metricsPersistence.description: 5-minute snapshots, 7 days retained. The management plugin forgets what happened the moment you close the tab — Queue History doesn't. See exactly when a queue started filling, even if nobody was watching.

incidentDiagnosis.title: Incident Diagnosis Engine
incidentDiagnosis.description: The management plugin shows state. Incident Diagnosis shows cause. Correlates queue backlog spikes, consumer drops, and publish rate changes into one readable timeline — 40 minutes of tab-switching, done automatically.

messageTracing.title: Message Tracing (Firehose)
messageTracing.description: Follow every message from publish to delivery — or failure. Full broker-level tracing in real time, with routing key, exchange, and payload size. Find out exactly where a message disappeared.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Self-Hosted Solution
enterprise.description: For organizations requiring on-premise deployment, complete data control, and enterprise-grade features. Deploy Qarote in your own infrastructure with full access to advanced capabilities.
enterprise.unlimitedServersDesc: Monitor as many RabbitMQ servers as you need
enterprise.advancedSecurityDesc: Complete control over your data and deployment

connection.title: Up and running in three steps
connection.subtitle: No agents, no Prometheus exporters, no YAML. Qarote connects directly to the RabbitMQ management API.

step1.title: Sign up
step1.description: Create your account in seconds. No credit card required. Free tier has no time limit.
step1.transformMonitoring: Add the intelligence layer your RabbitMQ deserves.

step2.title: Add your servers
step2.description: Paste your RabbitMQ management URL. Production, staging, and dev — all in one place.

step3.title: Get full visibility
step3.description: Real-time queue depth, consumer health, and rate-of-change visible instantly. Set up alerts and Daily Digest for your whole team.

audience.title: Built for teams like yours
audience.card1Description: Your team runs RabbitMQ. Nobody has set up proper monitoring yet.
audience.card1Detail: Free for one server. Connect in 2 minutes.
audience.card2Description: Grafana covers your infrastructure. It doesn't surface what your consumers are actually doing.
audience.card2Detail: Topology visualization, incident diagnosis, message tracing — the layer Prometheus metrics don't see.

finalCta.title: Your next incident is already building. You just can't see it yet.
finalCta.subtitle: Connect your RabbitMQ server in 2 minutes. Queue History, consumer health alerts, and Incident Diagnosis — free to try, no credit card.
finalCta.freeTierScope: Free tier: 1 server, live monitoring, queue management — no time limit. Alerting and multi-server from $29/mo.

founderQuote.highlight: Qarote is the gap between those two numbers.
founderQuote.name: Brice Tessier

faqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Qarote
faqSection.stillHaveQuestionsDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

seo.title: Qarote — RabbitMQ Monitoring, Alerting & Queue History
seo.description: Self-hosted RabbitMQ monitoring with live queue depth, consumer health alerting, 7-day Queue History, and Incident Diagnosis. No Prometheus, no Grafana. Free tier, connect in 2 minutes.
